1	/**
2	 * Layout template functions.
3	 * Each returns an HTML string for the slide's inner content.
4	 * Layouts reference CSS custom properties — never hard-coded colours/fonts.
5	 */
6	
7	const LENS_META = {
8	  transparency: { short: 'T', label: 'Transparency' },
9	  distortion: { short: 'D', label: 'Distortion' },
10	  extraction: { short: 'E', label: 'Extraction' },
11	};
12	
13	function renderLensMarkers(slide) {
14	  if (!Array.isArray(slide.lenses) || slide.lenses.length === 0) return '';
15	
16	  const markers = slide.lenses
17	    .filter(lens => LENS_META[lens])
18	    .map((lens) => {
19	      const meta = LENS_META[lens];
20	      return `<span class="lens-marker lens-marker--${lens}" title="${meta.label}">${meta.short}</span>`;
21	    })
22	    .join('');
23	
24	  if (!markers) return '';
25	  return `<div class="lens-marker-group" aria-label="Applied lenses">${markers}</div>`;
26	}
27	
28	// ─── COVER LAYOUTS ──────────────────────────────
29	
30	export function coverBoldFull(slide) {
31	  return `
32	    <div class="slide-inner cover-bold-full">
33	      <div class="cover-title">${slide.title}</div>
34	      ${slide.subtitle ? `<div class="cover-subtitle">${slide.subtitle}</div>` : ''}
35	      <div class="cover-bottom">
36	        <div class="cover-author">${slide.author || ''}</div>
37	        <div class="cover-date-pill">${slide.date || ''}</div>
38	      </div>
39	      ${renderLensMarkers(slide)}
40	    </div>
41	  `;
42	}
43	
44	export function coverDarkMinimal(slide) {
45	  return `
46	    <div class="slide-inner cover-dark-minimal">
47	      <div class="cover-top">
48	        <div class="cover-badge">${slide.badge || ''}</div>
49	        <div class="cover-date-pill">${slide.date || ''}</div>
50	      </div>
51	      <div class="cover-title">${slide.title}</div>
52	      <div class="cover-subtitle">${slide.subtitle || ''}</div>
53	      ${renderLensMarkers(slide)}
54	    </div>
55	  `;
56	}
57	
58	// ─── SECTION DIVIDER LAYOUTS ────────────────────
59	
60	export function dividerColorBurst(slide, page) {
61	  return `
62	    <div class="slide-inner divider-color-burst">
63	      ${slide.section_number != null
64	        ? `<div class="divider-badge">Section ${slide.section_number}</div>`
65	        : ''}
66	      <div class="divider-title">${slide.title}</div>
67	      <div class="divider-page">${String(page).padStart(2, '0')}</div>
68	      ${renderLensMarkers(slide)}
69	    </div>
70	  `;
71	}
72	
73	export function dividerDarkCinematic(slide, page) {
74	  return `
75	    <div class="slide-inner divider-dark-cinematic">
76	      <div class="divider-top">
77	        ${slide.section_number != null
78	          ? `<div class="divider-badge">Section ${slide.section_number}</div>`
79	          : '<span></span>'}
80	        <div class="divider-page">${String(page).padStart(2, '0')}</div>
81	      </div>
82	      <div class="divider-title">${slide.title}</div>
83	      ${slide.subtitle ? `<div class="divider-subtitle">${slide.subtitle}</div>` : ''}
84	      ${renderLensMarkers(slide)}
85	    </div>
86	  `;
87	}
88	
89	// ─── CONTENT LAYOUTS ────────────────────────────
90	
91	export function contentSplitCards(slide, page) {
92	  const colors = [
93	    'var(--color-accent-1)',
94	    'var(--color-accent-2)',
95	    'var(--color-accent-3)',
96	    'var(--color-accent-4)',
97	  ];
98	
99	  const cards = (slide.points || []).map((point, i) => `
100	    <div class="evidence-card">
101	      <div class="card-icon" style="background: ${colors[i % colors.length]}"></div>
102	      <div class="card-text">
103	        <h3>${point.title}</h3>
104	      </div>
105	    </div>
106	  `).join('');
107	
108	  return `
109	    <div class="slide-inner content-split-cards">
110	      <div class="content-nav">${slide.section || ''}</div>
111	      <div class="content-body-area">
112	        <div class="content-left">
113	          <h2>${slide.heading}</h2>
114	          ${slide.body ? `<p>${slide.body}</p>` : ''}
115	        </div>
116	        <div class="content-right">
117	          ${cards}
118	        </div>
119	      </div>
120	      <div class="content-footer">
121	        <span class="page-number">${String(page).padStart(2, '0')}</span>
122	      </div>
123	      ${renderLensMarkers(slide)}
124	    </div>
125	  `;
126	}
127

163	export function dataBigNumbers(slide, page) {

168	    'var(--color-accent-4)',

170	
171	  const blocks = (slide.stats || []).map((stat, i) => `

173	      <div class="stat-value">${stat.value}</div>
174	      <div class="stat-label">${stat.label}</div>
175	    </div>

177	
178	  return `

196	export function dataFullBleed(slide, page) {

220	// ─── STATEMENT LAYOUTS ──────────────────────────
221	
222	export function statementCentered(slide) {
223	  const text = slide.text.replace(
224	    new RegExp(`(${escapeRegex(slide.highlight)})`, 'gi'),
225	    '<span class="highlight">$1</span>'
226	  );
227	
228	  return `
229	    <div class="slide-inner statement-centered">
230	      <div class="statement-label">${slide.section || ''}</div>
231	      <div class="statement-text">${text}</div>
232	      ${slide.attribution ? `<div class="statement-attribution">${slide.attribution}</div>` : ''}
233	      ${renderLensMarkers(slide)}
234	    </div>
235	  `;
236	}
237	
238	export function statementEditorial(slide) {
239	  const text = slide.text.replace(
240	    new RegExp(`(${escapeRegex(slide.highlight)})`, 'gi'),
241	    '<span class="highlight">$1</span>'
242	  );
243	
244	  return `
245	    <div class="slide-inner statement-editorial">
246	      <div class="statement-label">${slide.section || ''}</div>
247	      <div class="statement-text">${text}</div>
248	      ${slide.attribution ? `<div class="statement-attribution">${slide.attribution}</div>` : ''}
249	      ${renderLensMarkers(slide)}
250	    </div>
251	  `;
252	}
253	
254	// ─── HELPERS ────────────────────────────────────
255	
256	function escapeRegex(str) {
257	  if (!str) return '';
258	  return str.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&');
259	}
260	
261	// ─── LAYOUT REGISTRY ────────────────────────────
262	
263	export const layoutRegistry = {
264	  // Covers
265	  'cover-bold-full':      coverBoldFull,
266	  'cover-dark-minimal':   coverDarkMinimal,
267	
268	  // Dividers
269	  'divider-color-burst':     dividerColorBurst,
270	  'divider-dark-cinematic':  dividerDarkCinematic,
271	
272	  // Content
273	  'content-split-cards':  contentSplitCards,
274	  'content-wide-visual':  contentWideVisual,
275	
276	  // Data
277	  'data-big-numbers':     dataBigNumbers,
278	  'data-full-bleed':      dataFullBleed,
279	
280	  // Statement
281	  'statement-centered':   statementCentered,
282	  'statement-editorial':  statementEditorial,
283	};
284
```

1161	
1162	/* ============================================
1163	   TEXTURE: Pinstripes
1164	   Very fine lines via repeating-linear-gradient.
1165	   Real DOM elements (not pseudo-elements) so that
1166	   html2canvas captures them for WebGL refraction.
1167	   Uses currentColor so stripes adapt to the slide's
1168	   text colour (dark on light, light on dark).
1169	   ============================================ */
1170	
1171	.texture-pinstripes {
1172	  position: absolute;
1173	  inset: 0;
1174	  pointer-events: none;
1175	  z-index: 0;
1176	  opacity: 0.06;
1177	}
1178	
1179	.slide[data-pinstripes="vertical"] .texture-pinstripes {
1180	  background: repeating-linear-gradient(
1181	    90deg,
1182	    transparent 0,
1183	    transparent 4px,
1184	    currentColor 4px,
1185	    currentColor 4.5px
1186	  );
1187	}
1188	
1189	.slide[data-pinstripes="horizontal"] .texture-pinstripes {
1190	  background: repeating-linear-gradient(
1191	    0deg,
1192	    transparent 0,
1193	    transparent 4px,
1194	    currentColor 4px,
1195	    currentColor 4.5px
1196	  );
1197	}
1198	
1199	.slide[data-pinstripes="diagonal"] .texture-pinstripes {
1200	  background: repeating-linear-gradient(
1201	    45deg,
1202	    transparent 0,
1203	    transparent 4px,
1204	    currentColor 4px,
1205	    currentColor 4.5px
1206	  );
1207	}
1208	
1209	
1210	/* ============================================
1211	   TEXTURE: Noise
1212	   Generated canvas texture set as inline
1213	   background-image. Real DOM element so that
1214	   html2canvas captures it for WebGL refraction.
1215	   ============================================ */
1216	
1217	.shape-overlay.texture-noise {
1218	  position: absolute;
1219	  inset: 0;
1220	  pointer-events: none;
1221	  z-index: 5;
1222	  background-size: 256px 256px;
1223	}
1224	
1225	
1226	
1227	/* ============================================
1228	   SHAPE OVERLAYS — positioned absolutely
1229	   ============================================ */
1230	
1231	.shape-overlay {
1232	  position: absolute;
1233	  pointer-events: none;
1234	  z-index: 0;
1235	}
1236	
1237	/* WebGL droplet canvas — covers entire slide, ON TOP of content */
1238	.droplet-canvas.shape-overlay {
1239	  inset: 0;
1240	  width: 100%;
1241	  height: 100%;
1242	  display: block;
1243	  z-index: 10;
1244	}
1245	
1246	/* Ensure content sits above shapes */
1247	.slide-inner > *:not(.shape-overlay):not(.lens-marker-group) {
1248	  position: relative;
1249	  z-index: 1;
1250	}
1251
```

164	  const bgColors = [
165	    'var(--color-accent-1)',
166	    'var(--color-accent-2)',
167	    'var(--color-accent-3)',
168	    'var(--color-accent-4)',
169	  ];
170	
171	  const blocks = (slide.stats || []).map((stat, i) => `
172	    <div class="stat-block" data-accent="${i % bgColors.length}" style="background: ${bgColors[i % bgColors.length]}">
173	      <div class="stat-value">${stat.value}</div>
174	      <div class="stat-label">${stat.label}</div>
175	    </div>
176	  `).join('');
177	
178	  return `
179	    <div class="slide-inner data-big-numbers">
180	      <div class="data-nav">${slide.section || ''}</div>
181	      <div class="data-body">
182	        <div class="data-left">
183	          <h2>${slide.heading}</h2>
184	          ${slide.body ? `<p>${slide.body}</p>` : ''}
185	        </div>
186	        <div class="data-right">
187	          ${blocks}
188	        </div>
189	      </div>
190	      <div class="data-page">${String(page).padStart(2, '0')}</div>
191	      ${renderLensMarkers(slide)}
192	    </div>
193	  `;
194	}
